What We Do

Tailored services for
exceptional moves.

Every relocation is unique. We design a custom plan around your timeline, your belongings, and your standards.

⌂

Residential Moving

White-glove home relocation for apartments, estates, and everything between. Every item catalogued and protected.

◈

Corporate Relocation

Seamless office and commercial moves executed after-hours or weekends. Zero downtime guaranteed.

▣

Packing & Crating

Custom crating for art, antiques, and heirlooms. Museum-grade materials and techniques.

◇

Climate Storage

Temperature and humidity-controlled vaults with individual alarm systems. 24/7 monitored.

→

Long Distance

Coast-to-coast relocations with dedicated trucks, GPS tracking, and real-time status updates.

♦

Specialty Transport

Pianos, sculptures, wine collections, and high-value items handled by certified specialists.

14
Years

Why Meridian

Built on trust,
refined by experience.

Founded in Chicago in 2010, Meridian Moving Co. was born from a simple belief: your possessions deserve better than a generic truck and a hurried crew. Every member of our 85-person team undergoes 200+ hours of training, background checks, and ongoing certification.

We serve clients who value reliability over speed, precision over shortcuts, and peace of mind over the lowest bid. That commitment has earned us a 4.97-star rating across 12,400+ relocations.

Licensed & DOT Certified
Full-Value Insurance
Background-Checked Crew
GPS-Tracked Fleet
No Subcontractors Ever
Complimentary Surveys

Instant Estimate

Plan your investment.

Get a ballpark figure in seconds. Final pricing follows our complimentary in-home survey.

Testimonials

Trusted by those who
expect the best.

★★★★★

“They moved our entire 6-bedroom home including a 1920s Steinway grand piano. Not a scratch. The crew arrived in matching uniforms and treated every piece as if it were their own.”

Margaret Ellsworth

Homeowner — Lincoln Park

★★★★★

“Meridian relocated our 120-person office over a single weekend. Monday morning, every monitor was calibrated, every cable routed. It was as if we had always been there.”

David Nakamura

CEO, Arcline Technologies

★★★★★

“We trust Meridian with our entire exhibition. They custom-crate every piece and their climate-controlled transport gives us total peace of mind. Truly a class apart.”

Sofia Castellano

Gallery Director
